title: Boat Rental in Pula: A Complete Guide for 2026
html:
Pula, the vibrant heart of Istria, offers a stunning Adriatic coastline perfect for exploring by boat. Renting a motorboat from ACI Marina Pula typically costs between EUR 200 and EUR 600 for a half-day. To find reliable options, consider using BoatHire24 to compare verified boat listings.

How do I choose the best boat for my trip in Pula?

Consider your group size, budget, and desired itinerary to match the right boat type. The Adriatic Sea offers calm waters near Pula, ideal for motorboats and sailboats. A small open boat is perfect for couples, while a catamaran suits families up to ten guests. You can book a boat online in a few minutes.

Which boat should I rent from Pula?

  1. Motorboat (4, 6 guests), Best for zipping to nearby islands like the Brijuni Islands, from EUR 280 for a half-day.
  2. Sailboat (6, 8 guests), Enjoy the breeze and explore the rugged coastline, from EUR 400 for a full day.
  3. Catamaran (8, 12 guests), Spacious and stable for larger groups, with prices starting at EUR 800 for a full-day charter.
  4. Speedboat (2, 4 guests), A thrilling choice for short trips to secluded coves, from EUR 150 for a half-day. For a specific example, check this speedboat listing.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Pula?

Prices vary by boat type and season, ranging from EUR 90 for a shared tour to EUR 1,500 for a crewed yacht. Use the following as a general guide. One option worth a look is this speedboat.

  • Shared guided tour: EUR 90, 150 per person for a half-day.
  • Small motorboat (up to 5 guests): EUR 200, 400 for a half-day.
  • Catamaran full-day (up to 12 guests): EUR 1,000, 1,500 including fuel.
  • Crewed yacht (up to 8 guests): EUR 800, 1,200 for a full day with skipper.

To find the best deal for your dates, book a boat online directly through BoatHire24.

Where to set off in Pula

Pula offers several departure points. ACI Marina Pula is the largest, with full amenities and easy access to the open sea. Other options include Marina Veruda, just south of the city, and the small harbour at Pomer, which is quieter. For island exploration, the Brijuni Islands national park is a must, located only 6 nautical miles from Pula. The town of Fažana is also a popular starting point for boats heading to the Brijuni Islands. You can also see more at browse the listings.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Pula?

In Croatia, a valid boating licence is required for most bareboat charters, but the operator can confirm exact requirements. For vessels up to 15 hp, no licence is needed. Skippered charters are available for those without a licence. The high season runs from July to August, when the maestral wind provides steady afternoon breezes.

A local tip: pack a light jacket even in summer, as the bura wind can pick up suddenly in the northern Adriatic, especially near Cape Kamenjak.

At a glance

  • Price band: EUR 90 to EUR 1,500 per day
  • Peak months: July and August
  • Trip length: Half-day to full day
  • Maximum guests: Up to 12 on catamarans
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Pula

What is the best time of year for boating in Pula?

The best months are May through September, with warm weather and calm seas most days.

Can I rent a boat in Pula without a licence?

Yes, you can charter a boat with a skipper, or rent a small motorboat under 15 hp without a licence.

How far are the Brijuni Islands from Pula?

The Brijuni Islands are approximately 6 nautical miles from Pula Marina, about a 20-minute boat ride.

Is it safe to rent a boat on my own in Pula?

Yes, the local waters are well-marked and generally calm, but always check weather forecasts before departure.

With a clear idea of your needs, browse the listings on BoatHire24 to compare boat types and prices. Whether you choose a self-drive motorboat or a crewed yacht, the Adriatic awaits. If you own a boat in Pula, consider listing it on the platform to reach renters worldwide. BoatHire24 is a marketplace where you can rent or list boats securely. Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Pula and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
